steps.title: Compare the factored forms
steps.content: The target form is $ry^4(15y-9)$. Factor the original expression to make that same structure appear.

steps.title: Check with Desmos
steps.content:
A quick way to verify $r$ is to divide the original expression by $y^4(15y-9)$ at two values of $y$:
$$t_1=[1,2]$$
$$r_1=\frac{90t_1^5-54t_1^4}{t_1^4(15t_1-9)}$$
Desmos returns $[6,6]$, so the constant value is $6$.
